# Substring fixtures for test_latex.py snapshot checks.
# One marker per line. Comments start with '#' and are ignored.

# Document scaffolding
\documentclass{vlabs_report}
\setvlabsaudit{
\makevlabscover{
\tableofcontents
\begin{document}
\end{document}

# Section headers (one per Jinja section template)
\section{Executive Summary}
\section{Methodology}
\section{Results}
\section{Recommendations}
\section{Appendix}

# Methodology stays honest
What this audit does \emph{not} measure
leiconformal2018

# Results section embeds figures
coverage_calibration.pdf
score_breakdown.pdf
cost_per_correct.pdf

# Appendix carries reproducibility metadata
Audit id
Reproducibility metadata
\begin{verbatim}
